_description: Confusion set: boundary cases where two patterns are frequently confused. Used for edge-case evaluation and threshold tuning. Each entry specifies both candidate patterns and the expected winner.

pairs.boundary: nose shadow extent — loop shadow is small and loops down, rembrandt forms full triangle on shadow cheek
pairs.known_failure_mode: short nose or certain facial structures prevent triangle formation even with rembrandt positioning

pairs.boundary: fill source — butterfly uses ambient/reflector fill, clamshell has dedicated fill below chin
pairs.known_failure_mode: strong reflector fill can mimic clamshell; very weak fill clamshell looks like butterfly

pairs.boundary: camera-side illumination — broad key illuminates same side as camera, loop is off-axis
pairs.known_failure_mode: subject facing camera head-on makes broad/loop indistinguishable

pairs.boundary: key angle — split at 90 degrees illuminating exactly half, short is beyond axis but not full 90
pairs.known_failure_mode: tight short that approaches 90 degrees is functionally a split

pairs.boundary: key fill presence — rim_only has completely dark face, editorial_rim_key has subtle key fill
pairs.known_failure_mode: low ambient in editorial can be classified as rim_only

pairs.boundary: catchlight shape — ring_light has circular annular catchlight, flat_fashion has rectangular or absent
pairs.known_failure_mode: ring light at distance or with diffusion loses circular shape

pairs.boundary: directionality — window portrait has falloff gradient, overcast is even omnidirectional
pairs.known_failure_mode: large north-facing window at overcast day is nearly omnidirectional

pairs.boundary: background brightness — high_key has bright white overexposed background, flat_fashion is background-neutral
pairs.known_failure_mode: catalog shots on white background without background lights can be either

pairs.boundary: shadow cause — gobo shadow from physical shaping tool, split from key position
pairs.known_failure_mode: gobo with clean straight edge looks like split lighting on face

pairs.boundary: illuminated side — rembrandt key on shadow side creating triangle, short key on far side without triangle
pairs.known_failure_mode: subject facing wrong direction for pose context collapses the distinction
